symbols.name: check_purity
symbols.docstring: Analyze a function for evidence of impurity.

symbols.name: PurityChecker
symbols.docstring:
Stateful entry point that caches the underlying store/engine.

    Equivalent to calling :func:`check_purity` directly, but lets callers
    perform many checks against the same store without rebuilding internal
    state.

symbols.name: _to_evidence
symbols.docstring: Map a typed fact to a purity Evidence record.
